allowed_provider_queries: norgatedata.database_symbols for US Equities and US Equities Delisted
norgatedata.first_quoted_date and norgatedata.last_quoted_date for trial-selected symbols
norgatedata.price_timeseries daily adjusted OHLCV for trial-selected symbols and benchmarks

benchmark_contract.purpose: Relative diagnostic only; not a promotion gate.

component_contract.disable_reason: Norgate trial access is daily OHLCV; dollar-bar/tick reconstruction is unavailable.

disabled_weight_policy.reason: Redistributing the disabled dollar-bar sleeve after seeing data would alter the frozen candidate.

falsification_notes: Archive if the active daily sleeves cannot generate a completed trial panel.
Archive if validation net is non-positive in the trial-limited window.
Archive if a single active sleeve dominates positive contribution above 40%.
Archive if ex-best-active-sleeve net is non-positive.
Keep the result non-promotable because the Norgate trial is expected to provide only two years of history.

market_scope.selection_method: deterministic common-like symbols from local Norgate active and delisted databases, filtered by listing metadata and adjusted daily price availability during the two-year trial window
